articles.title: Coinbase Custody holds 635,000 BTC on behalf of Grayscale that refuses to share proof of reserves

Digital investment firm Grayscale has also declined to share proof of reserves, citing security concerns.

articles.title: Singapore’s central bank says not possible to protect local users from FTX fallout
